zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Leybourne於大約1275年出生在英國肯特萊波恩時，他的父親William de Leybourne35歲，母親Juliana de Sandwich22歲。他和Alice de Tosny至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1307年5月30日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Leybourne, Malling, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特萊波恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Leybourne于大约1275年出生在英国肯特萊波恩时，他的父亲William de Leybourne35岁，母亲Juliana de Sandwich22岁。他和Alice de Tosny至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1307年5月30日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Leybourne was born about 1275, in Leybourne, Kent, England, his father, William de Leybourne, was 35 and his mother, Juliana de Sandwich, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Alice de Tosny. He died before 30 May 1307, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Leybourne est né environ 1275, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William de Leybourne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Sandwich, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Alice de Tosny. Il est décédé avant 30 mai 1307, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Leybourne um 1275 in Leybourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Leybourne 35 und seine Mutter Juliana de Sandwich 22. Er hatte mit Alice de Tosny mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 30. Mai 1307 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Leybourne è nato il circa 1275 nel Leybourne, Kent, England, il suo padre, William de Leybourne, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Sandwich, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Alice de Tosny. Morì prima del 30 maggio 1307, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Leybourneが約1275年にイギリスケントリーボウルンで生まれた時，父William de Leybourneは35歳，母Juliana de Sandwichは22歳であった。彼はAlice de Tosnyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1307年5月30日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Leybourne(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 켄트 리보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Leybourne(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Sandwich(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Alice de Tosny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 5월 30일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Leybourne nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Leybourne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Sandwich, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Alice de Tosny. Ele faleceu antes 30 de maio de 1307, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Leybourne родился около 1275 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Leybourne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Sandwich, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Alice de Tosny. Он умер перед 30 май 1307 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1275–before 30 May 1307: e tusa o le 1275–a'e le'I oo le 30 Me 1307

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Leybourne nació aproximadamente 1275, en Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Leybourne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Juliana de Sandwich, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Alice de Tosny. Murió antes de 30 de mayo de 1307, en su pueblo.
